ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT CAYETANO LOPEZ MARTINEZ ON DEC-04-2018 - CONTINUED TO JAN-29-2019 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 514 PURSUANT TO ORDER OF THE COURT. MICHELE L. SCOTT, ESQ. APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF WALTER MOREANO. DEFENDANT/DEBTOR CAYETANO LOPEZ MARTINEZ WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER, PLACED UNDER OATH AND EXAMINED FOR LESS THAN TWENTY MINUTES BEFORE REFUSING TO ANSWER FURTHER QUESTIONS. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE ASSISTED MR. MARTINEZ DURING THIS AFTERNOON'S PROCEEDINGS. PROOF OF SERVICE OF OEX ON FILE. OEX PERSONALLY SERVED ON 10/26/18. COURT ORDERED DEFENDANT/DEBTOR MARTINEZ TO ANSWER PLAINTIFF'S QUESTIONS AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. NO FURTHER SERVICE REQUIRED. DEFENDANT/DEBTOR WAIVES NOTICE OF THE NEXT EXAMINATION ON 1/29/19. A SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHALL BE PROVIDED TO MR. MARTINEZ TO ASSIST HIM AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. JUDGE: ERIC R. FLEMING. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D514).

ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT SYLVIA VIDEL REYES ON DEC-04-2018 - CONTINUED TO JAN-29-2019 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 514 PURSUANT TO ORDER OF THE COURT. MICHELE L. SCOTT, ESQ. APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF WALTER MOREANO. DEFENDANT/DEBTOR SILVIA VIDEL REYES WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER, PLACED UNDER OATH AND EXAMINED FOR LESS THAN TWENTY MINUTES BEFORE REFUSING TO ANSWER FURTHER QUESTIONS. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE ASSISTED MS. REYES DURING THIS AFTERNOON'S PROCEEDINGS. PROOF OF SERVICE OF OEX ON FILE. OEX PERSONALLY SERVED ON 10/29/18. COURT ORDERED DEFENDANT/DEBTOR REYES TO ANSWER PLAINTIFF'S QUESTIONS AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. NO FURTHER SERVICE REQUIRED. DEFENDANT/DEBTOR WAIVES NOTICE OF THE NEXT EXAMINATION ON 1/29/19. A SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHALL BE PROVIDED TO MS. REYES TO ASSIST HER AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. JUDGE: ERIC R. FLEMING. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D514).

ORDER OF EXAMINATION JAN-29-2019 - DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT CAYETANO LOPEZ MARTINEZ. EXAMINATION COMPLETED. EDWARD C. SINGER, JR., ESQ. APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF WALTER MOREANO, WHO WAS NOT PRESENT FOR THIS AFTERNOON'S PROCEEDINGS. DEFENDANT CAYETANO LOPEZ MARTINEZ WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO ASSISTED MR. MARTINEZ DURING THE EXAMINATION. PROOF OF SERVICE OF OEX ON FILE. MATTER WAS CONTINUED TO TODAY FROM 12/4/18 PURSUANT TO STIPULATION OF COUNSEL AND DEFENDANT MARTINEZ. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: GAIL DEKREON. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

ORDER OF EXAMINATION JAN-29-2019 - DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT SYLVIA VIDEL LOPEZ. EXAMINATION COMPLETED. EDWARD C. SINGER, JR., ESQ. APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF WALTER MOREANO, WHO WAS NOT PRESENT FOR THIS AFTERNOON'S PROCEEDINGS. DEFENDANT SYLVIA VIDEL LOPEZ WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED.
